title: Making LB NGM Plates
author: Priota Islam
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbbgiijw
materials: Measure all the pre-autoclave reagents and add to the flask (Use a new weighing boat and spatula for each reagent. Also, the cholesterol is kept in the fridge.)
When autoclave is complete, remove the probe flask

steps.title: Book the autoclave (notebook on top of the machine)
steps.instruction: Book the autoclave (notebook on top of the machine).

steps.title: Take clean flasks from the glass...
steps.instruction: Take clean flasks from the glass kitchen (Only the ones with autoclave tape on are sterile)

steps.title: Once water is added mix thoroughly...
steps.instruction: Once water is added mix thoroughly and label with autoclave tape (‘LB NGM Rm 5020’). Makesure the bottle is not screwed completely when placing it inside the autoclave machine.

steps.title: Make sure that the autoclave’s probe...
steps.instruction: Make sure that the autoclave’s probe bottle is the same size as the largest bottle you use and fill it with water.

steps.title: Place the temperature probe in it
steps.instruction: Place the temperature probe in it.

steps.title: Fill up the autoclave with water...
steps.instruction: Fill up the autoclave with water until it reaches the grill.

steps.title: Place the bottles in the autoclave...
steps.instruction: Place the bottles in the autoclave and make sure that the cap is not screwed completely.

steps.title: Check the waste flask is not too full
steps.instruction: Check the waste flask is not too full

steps.title: It will take about 2
steps.instruction: It will take about 2.5 hours for 1L or larger bottles.

steps.title: Make sure to wear gloves as...
steps.instruction: Make sure to wear gloves as the flask will be hot

steps.title: Let the agar to cool to...
steps.instruction: Let the agar to cool to around 55°C, ie the bottle is cool enough to hold for a second with a gloved hand.

steps.title: Mix it well and start pouring...
steps.instruction: Mix it well and start pouring onto desired sized plates (See Protocol for plate pouring)

steps.title: Try not to shake the bottle...
steps.instruction: Try not to shake the bottle too much while mixing to avoid air bubbles.

steps.title: The agar needs to be warm...
steps.instruction: The agar needs to be warm to be poured without blocking the tubings, so try to pour as quickly as possible and if not poured immediately put the bottle on a waterbath set to 60C until being used.
